name: @academorix/foundation
description: Turborepo shim for the PHP `academorix/foundation` package. Maps `turbo run <task>` onto composer / pint / phpstan / pest. NOTE: the composer install script is deliberately named `install:composer` (not `install`) so pnpm's own lifecycle does not auto-invoke composer during a root `pnpm install`.

scripts.lint: echo 'PHP package - lint via composer lint / pint (run from the Laravel app)'
scripts.lint:fix: echo 'PHP package - lint:fix via composer format / pint --fix (run from the Laravel app)'
scripts.test: echo 'PHP package - test via composer test / pest (run from the Laravel app)'
